description_long: This cabinetry set features a modern, minimalist design with a combination of matte black and natural wood finishes. The lower section includes a countertop with an integrated black sink and faucet on the right, a built-in electric cooktop, and an oven in the center. The cabinetry below the countertop consists of multiple drawers and doors, all with a handleless, flat-panel design. The upper section is wall-mounted and includes closed cabinets with a central open shelving unit, ideal for storing dishes or decorative items. The wood grain pattern is prominent on the lower cabinetry, while the upper cabinets are finished in a sleek matte black. The overall look is contemporary and functional, suitable for urban kitchens or compact living spaces.
description: A modern kitchen cabinetry set with matte black and natural wood finishes, featuring integrated appliances, a sink, and open shelving. The design is sleek, handleless, and highly functional.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the cabinetry, the thickness of the countertop, and the vertical alignment of the upper and lower cabinets.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the continuous wood grain pattern across the back panels of both upper and lower cabinetry sections.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the depth and the clean, uninterrupted lines of the cabinetry profile.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the matte black cabinet doors, integrated oven, cooktop, sink, faucet, and open shelving in the upper section.
attribute_cabinet_type: base cabinet and wall cabinet set
attribute_door_configuration: multiple doors and drawers with open shelf
